  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Archer
    Archer hero class.
    BattleEngine
    Core turn-based battle controller for the game.
    BattleListener
    Listener interface used by BattleEngine to communicate with the UI layer.
    BattleModel
    Data model representing the current state of a battle.
    BattleScene
    The BattleScene class is responsible for rendering and controlling the graphical user interface of the battle phase in the game.
    BattleScene.HpBarUI
    Represents a visual HP bar component for a unit.
    BattleScene.SkillInfo
    Holds display name and description for each action type for a single hero.
    BattleSceneTemp
     
    BattleSceneTemp.HpBarUI
     
    BattleStage
    Represents the different stages of the battle state machine.
    Buffing
    Represents a buffing capability.
    Caster
    Caster hero class.
    Character
    Represents the different hero archetypes available in the battle system.
    CharacterSelectionScene
    The CharacterSelectionScene class renders the team selection screen.
    DefeatScene
    The DefeatScene class renders the defeat screen shown when the player loses a battle.
    Element
    Represents elemental types used in the combat system.
    Fighter
    Fighter hero class.
    GameEngine
    Global game controller responsible for managing game-wide state outside of battle.
    GameState
    Represents the high-level states of the game lifecycle.
    Healing
    Represents a healing capability.
    Heroes
    Abstract base class for all playable heroes.
    Main
     
    Monster
    Represents an enemy monster unit.
    MonsterFactory
    Factory class responsible for spawning enemy monster teams.
    MusicPlayer
     
    RandomElementGenerator
    Utility class responsible for assigning random elements to units and retrieving corresponding element images.
    RollElementScene
    The RollElementScene class renders the element rolling screen shown before a battle.
    SkillType
    Represents the different types of actions a hero can perform during battle.
    StartScene
    The StartScene class renders the main menu of the game.
    Tank
    Tank hero class.
    Target
    Represents a target container used for skill execution.
    TargetType
    Represents the targeting rules used by skills and abilities in battle.
    Unit
    Abstract base class representing a combat unit in the game.
    UpgradeScene
    The UpgradeScene class renders the hero upgrade screen that appears after victory.
    VictoryScene
    The VictoryScene class displays the victory screen after the player wins a battle.
